prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划:
2022–2025年最低位次约1001→731→553→535，整体呈持续前移趋势（位次数字逐年减小），近3年累计前移约466名，竞争逐年加剧；2025年基准位次约535名。
2 .【招生计划】该校在宁夏招生计划2022年10人、2023年10人、2024年13人、2025年13人；2026年计划缩减至10人，较2025年缩招约23%，招生名额减少将加剧竞争，推动位 次进一步前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学（威海）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，隶属C9联盟成员哈尔滨工业大学，2026年软科中国大学主榜排名第12位（参照 哈工大本部），属全国顶尖高校层次；哈工大（本部）近年声誉评价为中性/混合，抖音综合热度排名第10位（高热），国防七子品牌认知度高；威海校区作为 哈工大重要组成部分，共享校本部声誉资源，未见明显负面舆情；哈工大拥有力学、机械工程、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程4个A+学科，以及计算机科学 与技术、控制科学与工程、软件工程等多个A类学科；威海校区招生专业为工科试验班大类，覆盖计算机、电子、自动化、机器人、智能制造等方向，与校本部优势学科高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 工科试验班大类涵盖人工智能、计算机、电子信息等热门方向，社会热度持续较高；宁夏2026年普通高考考生总数约66000人，较2025年（物理类44491 +历史类21406=65897）略有增长，整体竞争环境趋紧；哈尔滨工业大学（威海）位于山东省威海市，对宁夏考生属跨省就读；该 校在宁夏招生规模较小（10人），招生占比极低，地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划缩招23%加剧竞争、宁夏考生总数小 幅增长以及哈工大品牌高热度的综合作用，预计2026年最低录取位次将在2025年535名基础上进一步前移。预测最低位次约481名，区间423–539名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（未来信息）（含计算机科学与技术、人工智能、网络空间安全等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（未来智造卓越优才计划）（含机器人工程、机械设计制造及其自动化、智能制造工程等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（机器人与智能装备拔尖班）（含机器人工程、机械、材料、能源动力等）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（423–539名）内，建议以二档工科试验班（未来智造卓越优才计划）为主攻方向，一档工科试验班（未来信息）可冲刺，三档工科试验班（机器人与智能装备拔 尖班）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<423名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 1001 → 731 → 553 → 535, showing a continuous forward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year). Over the past 3 years, the cumulative forward shift is about 466 places, indicating intensifying competition year by year. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 535.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The university's enrollment plan in Ningxia was 10 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 13 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is reduced to 10, a decrease of about 23% compared to 2025. The reduction in enrollment slots will intensify competition, pushing the ranking further forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, affiliated with the C9 League member Harbin Institute of Technology. In 2026, it ranked 12th in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities (referencing HIT main campus), placing it among the top universities nationwide. HIT (main campus) has a neutral/mixed reputation evaluation in recent years, with a comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking of 10th (high heat), and high brand recognition as one of the 'Defense Seven Sons'. As an important part of HIT, the Weihai campus shares the reputation resources of the main campus, with no significant negative public opinion. HIT has 4 A+ disciplines: Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Environmental Science and Engineering, as well as multiple A-level disciplines including Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering. The Weihai campus recruits for the Engineering Experimental Class (large category), covering directions such as computer science, electronics, automation, robotics, and intelligent manufacturing, which highly match the advantageous disciplines of the main campus.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Engineering Experimental Class (large category) covers popular directions such as artificial intelligence, computer science, and electronic information, with sustained high social popularity. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Ningxia in 2026 is about 66,000, slightly increased from 2025 (Physics Category 44,491 + History Category 21,406 = 65,897), indicating a tightening overall competition environment. Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) is located in Weihai City, Shandong Province, which is an inter-provincial study location for Ningxia candidates. The university's enrollment scale in Ningxia is small (10 students), with a very low enrollment proportion, so regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the 23% reduction in enrollment plan for 2026 intensifying competition, the slight increase in the total number of Ningxia candidates, and the high popularity of the HIT brand, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will further advance from the 2025 ranking of 535. The predicted minimum ranking is about 481, with a range of 423–539.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (including Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Cyberspace Security, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Intelligent Manufacturing Excellent Talent Program) (including Robotics Engineering, Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics and Intelligent Equipment Top Class) (including Robotics Engineering, Mechanics, Materials, Energy and Power, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (423–539), it is recommended to focus on the Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Class (Future Intelligent Manufacturing Excellent Talent Program) as the main target, with the Tier 1 Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) as a reach, and the Tier 3 Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics and Intelligent Equipment Top Class) as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<423), you can focus on reaching for the Tier 1 flagship majors.
